summary: Iteration 61 Testing - Mentor CRM Scoping and Student Reassignment. Backend APIs working correctly. Fixed bug where reassign endpoint only supported 'mentor' role (now supports master_of_academics). Frontend reassign dropdown working. Monthly closings dialog has a click handler issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Monthly closings dialog does not open when clicking Net Active button. API call is made but dialog state (showClosingsDialog) doesn't update. Click handler triggers but dialog doesn't render.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/mentor/revenue-summary returns 200 with correct data
Backend: GET /api/mentor/revenue-summary?mentor_id=<id> returns filtered data for specific mentor
Backend: GET /api/mentor/monthly-closings returns 200 with 23 students, AED 113,828 deposits
Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/reassign-mentor works for mentor role
Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/reassign-mentor works for master_of_academics role (after fix)
Backend: Reassign endpoint requires super_admin or admin role
Backend: Reassign endpoint validates mentor exists
Frontend: Revenue banner displays correctly with AED 113,828 redeposits
Frontend: Mentor filter dropdown shows all mentors including master_of_academics
Frontend: Student card dropdown shows 'Reassign to:' section for super admin
Frontend: Reassign dropdown excludes current mentor from list
Frontend: Reassign dropdown includes Edwin Joy (master_of_academics)
action_items: FIX: Monthly closings dialog not opening - investigate why showClosingsDialog state is not being set to true after API call succeeds. The fetchMonthlyClosings function is called, API returns 200, but dialog doesn't render.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 5526 - reassign endpoint now supports mentor, master_of_academics, and academic_master roles
FIXED: MentorCRMPage.jsx lines 318-335 - mentor list now fetches all mentor-related roles for reassign dropdown
ISSUE: MentorCRMPage.jsx line 370 - setShowClosingsDialog(true) is called but dialog doesn't render. May be a React state update issue or Dialog component issue.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed reassign endpoint to support master_of_academics role
/app/frontend/src/pages/MentorCRMPage.jsx - Updated mentor list fetch to include all mentor roles, added e.stopPropagation() to Net Active click handler
/app/backend/tests/test_mentor_scoping_reassign.py - New test file for mentor scoping and reassignment

success_rate.frontend: 85% (Reassign dropdown works, Monthly closings dialog has issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for mentor scoping and reassignment are fully working. The reassign endpoint was fixed to support master_of_academics role (Edwin). Frontend reassign dropdown works correctly - shows 'Reassign to:' label with mentor names excluding current mentor. The monthly closings dialog has an issue where it doesn't open when clicking Net Active button - the API call is made and returns 200 but the dialog state doesn't update. Main agent should investigate the Dialog component rendering.

student_reassign.frontend_dropdown: WORKING - shows 'Reassign to:' with mentor names

monthly_closings_dialog.issue: Dialog doesn't open despite API returning 200

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: Reassign endpoint only looked for role='mentor', excluding master_of_academics users like Edwin
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed query to support mentor, master_of_academics, and academic_master roles

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: Mentor list only fetched role=mentor users
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Now fetches mentor, master_of_academics, and academic_master roles and deduplicates
